examples: The soldier brought his halberd to a present-arms and said mockingly, "I salute your gracious Highness."
Their halberd staves were covered with crimson velvet, fastened with gilt nails, and ornamented with gold tassels.
Among the rubbish, you find a Halberd of the Swiftwatch.
The halberd (an ax blade mounted on a long shaft with a useful hook for grabbing enemies) is well-represented in the sale.
In particular, a large wound at the base of his skull seemed likely to have been made by a blade like a halberd.
